word: H1643 - גֶּרֶשׂ - geres - gheh'-res - Beaten corn

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּרשׂ

Transliteration: gereś

Phonetic: gheh'-res

BDB Definition:

  1. a crushing (that which is crushed), grain, grits, groats

Origin: from an unused root meaning to husk

TWOT entry: 387a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
